focus: [D4-A8/D4] inner-generator context loss: start_run --agent spawns a second model with no sk-design; compile judgment into brief and form answers

graphEvents.label: How can sk-design judgment survive the Open Design start_run inner-agent boundary?
start_run/od run start spawns an inner agent and only the prompt/message plus inputs are guaranteed payload carriers
The discovery-form answer fires the build and can bypass sk-design if it is raw skip/default text
skDesignGate needs briefDigest and formAnswersDigest to bind loaded context to Open Design payloads
The inner agent/model selection must be part of the proof because opencode without --model uses a default model
A design-authorized Open Design start_run must carry a compiledOpenDesignBrief derived from sk-design judgment
A design-authorized Open Design form response must carry compiledFormAnswers bound to skDesignGate
The skDesignGate brief/form digests must match the outgoing Open Design payload before the daemon receives it

label: How can sk-design judgment survive the Open Design start_run inner-agent boundary?
start_run/od run start spawns an inner agent and only the prompt/message plus inputs are guaranteed payload carriers
recommendation: Require compiledOpenDesignBrief in guarded start_run/od run start payloads and bind its digest to skDesignGate.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for payload schema, hashes, and transcript replay; ADVISORY for the inner model's private reasoning and final taste quality.

label: The discovery-form answer fires the build and can bypass sk-design if it is raw skip/default text
recommendation: Guard od ui respond and follow-up run-start messages with compiledFormAnswers; deny raw --skip or generic defaults unless each accepted default is justified against register/dials/proof sources.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for captured MCP/CLI/proxy payloads; ADVISORY for final visual quality.

label: skDesignGate needs briefDigest and formAnswersDigest to bind loaded context to Open Design payloads
recommendation: Extend skDesignGate.openDesignLineage with projectId, conversationId, runId, innerAgent, innerModel, briefDigest, formAnswersDigest, and compiledPayloadSchema; recompute digests at the tool boundary.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for token shape and digest matching; ADVISORY for aesthetic outcome.

label: The inner agent/model selection must be part of the proof because opencode without --model uses a default model
recommendation: Require explicit innerAgent and innerModel in compiledOpenDesignBrief and skDesignGate; verify the run start event matches before accepting proof.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for payload/start-event replay; ADVISORY for model output quality.

label: A design-authorized Open Design start_run must carry a compiledOpenDesignBrief derived from sk-design judgment
A design-authorized Open Design form response must carry compiledFormAnswers bound to skDesignGate
The skDesignGate brief/form digests must match the outgoing Open Design payload before the daemon receives it

direction: Rely on parent-local sk-design loading without compiling the judgment into the Open Design brief and form-answer payloads
reason: The documented Open Design run path spawns an inner agent and the guaranteed carriers are the prompt/message, inputs, and form answers; no checked source says the inner agent inherits the parent context window.
